name: plan_manifest_wave2_api_boundary
description: Keep control-plane manifests raw at the API boundary instead of normalizing them into helm bundles.

jobs.label: preserve_raw_control_manifests_at_api_boundary
jobs.prompt:
## Goal
Fix the manifest GET API boundary so control-plane manifests are returned as raw control objects, not mutated into helm bundles.

## Read first
- `Code&DBs/Workflow/artifacts/workflow/_control_manifest_registry_contract.json`
- `Code&DBs/Workflow/runtime/helm_manifest.py`
- `Code&DBs/Workflow/surfaces/api/handlers/workflow_run.py`
- `Code&DBs/Workflow/tests/unit/test_workflow_run_manifest_handlers.py`

## Required changes
1. Update the manifest GET handler in `workflow_run.py` so it detects control-plane manifests by `kind` / `manifest_family`.
2. For ordinary workspace/app manifests, keep existing helm normalization behavior.
3. For control-plane manifests, return the raw manifest payload with stable metadata instead of adapting it into a helm surface bundle.
4. Do not change save/generate/refine semantics for workspace manifests in this packet.

## Required tests
Update `test_workflow_run_manifest_handlers.py` to cover both:
- existing helm manifest GET behavior remains unchanged
- control-plane manifests come back raw and retain their original `kind`, `manifest_family`, and `manifest_type`

Touch only the handler and its tests.

Database: `$WORKFLOW_DATABASE_URL`
